user.title: Nord Pool
user.description: Select your Nord Pool integration and enter your price area code (e.g. SE4, FI, DK1).

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description:
Enter the constants for your electricity tariff. The actual price is calculated as:

`actual = spot × VAT × surcharge + grid_fee`

ev_charger.title: EV Charger (Easee)
ev_charger.description: Select the entities and device for your Easee EV charger. Both cars share the same charger device.

ev_car.title: EV / Cars
ev_car.description: Select the entities for both cars. EV 1 takes priority when plugged in; EV 2 is used when EV 1 is not connected.

data.PLACEHOLDER_EV_CHARGING: EV 1 actively charging binary sensor (OFF when car reaches its own limit)
data.PLACEHOLDER_EV_WAKE_BUTTON: EV 1 force data update button (wakes car before charging)
data.PLACEHOLDER_EV2_CHARGING: EV 2 actively charging binary sensor (OFF when car reaches its own limit)
data.PLACEHOLDER_EV2_WAKE_BUTTON: EV 2 force data update button (wakes car before charging)

pool.title: Pool Heat Pump
pool.description: Select the switch controlling your pool heat pump and the pool temperature sensor.

grid_solar.title: Grid Meter & Solar Forecast
grid_solar.description: Select your grid meter sensors (in kW) and the solar forecast sensor reporting remaining production today (in kWh).

abort.already_configured: HA Energy Optimizer is already configured.
